title: Better Farming with Hoes - Farmers Delight Compatibility
description: Adds the crops from Farmers Delight into my Better Farming with Hoes data pack and allows it to be used on them!
body: # Better Farming with Hoes - Farmers Delight Compatability ** Please let me know if there is any issues with 26.1 Thank you! ** Allows the crops in Farmers Delight to be harvested and replanted like in Better Farming with Hoes
